name: Orange Crepes Kerr
recipeInstructions:
ORANGE CREPES KERR
Crepes:
1. Blend the flour and milk, then add the whole egg and egg yolk. Beat well with a whisk.
2. Stir in the lemon zest and vanilla extract. Let rest for 30 minutes.
Sauce:
1. Quickly sauté 1 tablespoon orange zest in 1 teaspoon oil until golden brown.
2. Add 1/2 cup sweet dessert wine (non-alcoholic wine can be used) to the mixture. Reduce the mixture to a syrupy stage.
3. Stir in 2 tablespoons brown sugar, then add 8 ounces fresh orange juice.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together 2 tablespoons yogurt cheese and 2 tablespoons cornstarch.
5. Pour the orange mixture through a strainer into the yogurt cheese mixture. Return the mixture to the pan and heat.
6. Make crepes by dipping them into the sauce mixture, folding into quarters, and placing them in the sauce.
7. Add the juice of 1 lemon and peeled slices of orange to the crepes and sauce.
8. Serve 2 crepes per person.
GS
